content.en:
this day.

The trace of extreme light contained inside the Extreme Mango White Grass was finally exhausted.

At this time, this Extreme Mango White Grass no longer has an offensive type, and Ye Tian can touch it casually.

Subsequently, he lifted the copy state of this Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, and suddenly this Extreme Miscanthus White Grass turned into ashes.

Then, Ye Tian continued to copy the Extreme Mangbai Grass, although it would take a long time, he didn't care about the time.

After a long time, the second Miscanthus White Grass was copied, and Ye Tian continued to comprehend.

In this way, as the years passed, Ye Tian's attainments in the Extreme Path of Light became higher and higher.

......

No Road Tower.

"The Lord of the Ancient sent me a message, could it be that the reward has arrived?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He won the first place on the Extreme Genius Battle Killing List, and naturally there was a reward, although he didn't attach much importance to such a reward, but he wouldn't want it.

So, Ye Tian came to the Lord of the Ancients.

"Ye Tian, the reward for the Extreme Dao Genius Battle has been determined. "

The Lord of the Ancient said with a smile.

"Lord of the Ancients, what is the reward?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Rest assured, it's good for you. The Lord of the Ancient said: "I know that you are not short of resources at the moment, so this reward is not a resource, but an opportunity to gather a treasure of will. "

"Strange will?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, it was the first time he had heard of this.

The Lord of the Ancient Ancients explained, "Ye Tian, the Strange Treasure of Will is a secret. The end of our realm and the extreme deep sea, you should know what the real advantage is, right?"

"Will!"

Ye Tian said.

Although the Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea also have a will, the Extreme Dao creatures have reached an extremely high level of will as soon as they are born, and they lack remodeling, while the cultivators at the end of the realm are cultivating from a weak level, so they have super reshaping of the will, which can condense the will clone and have one more life.

If there was no will clone, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea would have already destroyed the end of the realm.

Therefore, the will is the advantage of the end of the world.

"Yes, it's the will!" said the Lord of the Ancients: "It's like the level of the super-perfect master, they have a large number of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, it is easier to break the Extreme Dao chains, and the super-perfect masters at the end of our realm can break one Extreme Dao chains, and they can break ten, or even twenty." Therefore, in terms of the Extreme Path Perfect Ancestral Body, they had an even greater advantage. But why, the end of our realm can still block the extreme deep sea, that is because of will. "

"When the eternal is in control, it is the first time that the will clone is condensed, and this is a big advantage. And the condensation of the will treasure is the second advantage opened up by the perfect masters of the extreme realm of our realm. It's like the Lord of the White Night you've seen, and he's condensed a treasure of will. Only by condensing the Wisdom of the Will can the cultivators at the end of our realm maintain their superiority. Just like the Lord of the White Night, one of the reasons why his strength far exceeds that of ordinary Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers is that his will treasure is very strong. "The Lord of the Ancients.

"Lord of the Ancients, haven't you condensed the Extreme Dao Treasure?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's condensed, but my will is very weak, so I won't talk about it. The Lord of the Ancients said.

Subsequently, under the explanation of the Lord of the Ancients, Ye Tian finally fully understood the Strange Treasure of Will.

The shape of the will treasure opened up here at the end of the world is almost all in the shape of a tower, and it is not that there are no other types of will treasures that have been opened up before, but on the whole, it is still best to use the tower shape.

Once the Alien Treasure of Will is condensed, not only will the Will be compressed to a higher level of Will, but it will also have an extremely powerful defense.

It's like a powerful being who wants to erase your will, but once you have a treasure of will, you can't do it at all.

The Treasure of Will can strengthen defense, increase combat power, and more importantly, increase will.

At the beginning, there was only one layer of pagoda for the will treasure, and as the will was continuously improved, layer after layer of pagoda would be added, so that the speed of improving the will could be many times faster than before.

Under normal circumstances, it would be more difficult to condense the Willpower Treasure than to become the perfect controller of the Void.

Many Realm Perfect Controllers have spent countless years without success, and even some True Realm Perfect Controllers have not yet condensed their will.

Of course, the perfect controllers of the extreme realm at the end of the world have all condensed the will treasure, but some people have a strong will treasure and some people have a weak will treasure, this is just the difference.

"Ye Tian, your Extreme Dao will is already very strong, far surpassing other super-level perfect controllers, but if you rely on yourself, there is almost no way to condense the will treasure in the realm of super-level perfect controllers. But this time, your reward will hopefully make you gather a treasure of will. "The Lord of the Ancients.

It turned out that many Extreme Realm Perfect Masters had joined forces to create a treasure place for the cultivation of will, and if they practiced there, their will would be compressed unimaginably.

Moreover, there is also an inexplicable energy to replenish the power of the will, so that the will will never be exhausted.

What's more, there are also many illusory images of the will treasures condensed by the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, although the will treasures of each perfect controller of the Extreme Realm are tower-shaped, but there is still a difference, and understanding these will treasures will still help you condense your own will treasures.

In short, under many conditions, the success rate of condensing the will treasure is more than 100 times that of the outside world.

"Ye Tian, under normal circumstances, only those who have the perfect controller of the virtual realm have the hope of entering there, and you are only the one who is super perfect in control, you can enter there, you must grasp this opportunity, and strive to condense your own will treasure in the realm of the super perfect controller. At present, in the entire realm, there is only one person who has condensed a will treasure in the realm of the super-perfect master. "The Lord of the Ancients.

"There is only one person who has condensed a treasure of will from the super perfect master!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Still, he felt that he could definitely condense it.

Soon after, Ye Tian followed the Lord of Canggu to the Extreme Dao True River.

The Extreme True River is the most powerful Eternal Heaven and Earth at the end of the world, much more powerful than the Eternal Ruins, there are more than 100 perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm here, and the Lord of the White Night also comes from here.

And that treasure land is naturally located here, if it is placed in other small places, I am really afraid that it will be destroyed by the deep sea of the Extreme Dao.

And if it is placed in the Extreme Dao True River, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea will not dare to destroy it.

After entering the Extreme True River, they shuttled several times and came to the Void Will Realm.

Here, three Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are in the caretakers, ensuring that this place is extremely safe.

In front of a glorious will portal.

The Lord of the Canggu stood here and told Ye Tiandao: "Ye Tian, you can go in later, I can't go in." After entering, don't condense the will treasure first, first comprehend those will treasure phantoms, and wait until you have enough understanding of the will treasure before you go to enlightenment. You can practice ten billion eternal years in the Void Will Realm, so you have plenty of time. "

"yes, I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Instantly, he entered the realm of the will of nothingness.

And the Lord of the Canggu also left, after all, Ye Tian didn't know how long he had been cultivating, so he naturally wouldn't stay here for too long.

If Ye Tian comes out, he will come back then.
